notes: Reference adapter for the trade-credit category — a B2B accounting-data provider (AR/AP + P&L). Pairs with the sibling fake-trade-credit-api; configure FAKE_TRADE_CREDIT_API_URL + FAKE_TRADE_CREDIT_API_KEY in the host environment. requiredIdentityFields is empty because the adapter only needs the core ApplicantIdentity (ihsId, ic, fullName); the fetch() does its own defensive check.
